name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot m14164 】This passport case is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami reissue series, starting a fun journey with the artist's panda image. The classic monogram coated canvas and bright lining create a simple silhouette, with a flap pocket inside to securely hold the passport, card slots, and slip pocket. 14 x 2.5 x 10 cm (Height x Width x Length)
